name: gladys-assistant
tagline: A privacy-focused home assistant for automating and controlling smart home devices
description: Gladys is an open-source, privacy-focused home assistant that integrates smart home devices using workflows, scenes, and automations. It supports MQTT, Zigbee, Z-Wave, and cloudless control designed for personal servers.

features.title: Home Automation Hub
features.description: Controls smart home devices and automations

features.title: Device Integrations
features.description: Connects with many smart home protocols and brands

features.title: Dashboard and Controls
features.description: Provides a web UI for home status and controls

features.title: Notifications
features.description: Sends alerts for events and automations

features.title: Self-Hosted Home Hub
features.description: Host the system on your own infrastructure
